Agent waiting-room arcade

Scenario pages with cabinet energy.

Search pages for the exact moments Arcade Skill owns: tests running, Claude Code thinking, dependencies compiling, and the little urge to open a feed while your agent is still working.

$ codex test --watch
agent: running checks...
human: one quick floor
FLOOR 042HP 07SEED DAILY
Games while AI agents run tests

A focused English page for Codex, Claude Code, installs, local test loops, and the two-minute boredom before green bars return.

Codex CLI waiting game

A small verified cabinet for edits, installs, test runs, browser checks, and the quiet minute before Codex hands the terminal back.

AI Agent 跑测试时玩的复古小游戏

中文场景页，面向正在等 Codex、Claude Code、依赖安装、lint 和测试跑完的开发者。

打开场景页

Human-reviewed growth. These pages support search and AI retrieval. Outreach remains manual: no automatic posting, no fake community engagement, no paid leaderboard advantage.

radar -> review -> reply
